title: sorbus macrophylla
intro: Sorbus macrophylla, also known as the Chinese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of western China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Sorbus macrophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
